context7.description: Live documentation lookup for libraries and frameworks. Use when: checking API syntax, version migration guides, config options for React/Next.js/NestJS/FastAPI/Terraform/etc. Prefer over web search for library docs

exa-web-search.description: Semantic web search via Exa API — returns clean content, not just links. Use when: researching best practices, finding blog posts or tutorials, comparing approaches, looking up error messages. Use after GitHub search and primary docs

sequential-thinking.description: Step-by-step chain-of-thought reasoning. Use when: planning complex multi-step tasks, breaking down architectural decisions, debugging intricate logic, evaluating trade-offs between approaches

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph across sessions — stores entities, relations, observations. Use when: remembering project decisions, tracking team preferences, maintaining context about ongoing initiatives across conversations

playwright.description: Browser automation and testing via Playwright — navigate, click, fill, screenshot, snapshot DOM. Use when: E2E testing UI flows, verifying frontend changes in a real browser, taking screenshots for visual QA, testing responsive layouts

browserbase.description: Cloud browser sessions via Browserbase — headless Chrome in the cloud with session recording. Use when: running E2E tests in CI without local Chrome, testing in isolated browser environments, capturing session replays for debugging

browser-use.description: AI-powered browser agent — autonomous web navigation and data extraction. Use when: scraping dynamic SPAs, automating multi-step web workflows, extracting structured data from complex web UIs

magic.description: Magic UI component generation — animated React components with Tailwind + Framer Motion. Use when: building landing pages, adding animated sections, generating hero/feature/pricing/testimonial components with polished animations
